title: Arcanus
description: Adds Arcanus cards which buff the player, stores spells and More!
body:
![Arcanus](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/498cbdd240c1e62dbd65927a68c23e14daba18b9.png)

# Arcanus
A cool mod that adds cards which can buff the player, cards are crafted using Tetra and has ISS buffs. A magic accessory mod.

## Main Features
### Cards
Cards are modular curios items which can be modified in a workbench for different buffs or even infused with a spell.
### Static Curios items
There are currently 8 static curios items that buff players spells.

## Credits
- Styly(Developer)
- Amadhe(Artist)
- Ace(Eldrich Elden for helping me write super weird code)

Go checkout Ace's mod [Art Of Forging](https://modrinth.com/mod/art-of-forging-tetra)
